meta.name: template-tournament
meta.description: TEMPLATE (pattern, F + bracket): generate candidates, then judge them head-to-head in elimination rounds until one remains. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: When absolute scoring is unreliable but pairwise comparison is easy — designs, drafts, prompts

steps.does: generate <8> independent candidates for {task}, each from a distinct angle

steps.noProgressCondition: a round fails to eliminate anyone

body.does: pair up the remaining {candidates}, judge each pair head-to-head against {task}, and advance only the winners

steps.does: present the final winner from {survivors} with the bracket history and why it won each round

end.review: <e.g. a single winner plus a bracket that shows the judging was real>
